use_cases: Triggering form submissions with different visual states
Creating navigation actions with link-style buttons
Building modal or overlay triggers with outlined buttons
Implementing destructive actions like delete with red variants
Creating compact icon-only buttons for toolbars
ai_summary: A foundational button component with Radix UI Slot integration and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard accessibility with focus-visible ring, disabled states, and hover effects. Pure atomic component designed for composition into larger UI systems.
